div1.entryFree: Overpeer (cf. O'erpeer) to look down on, to rise above: your argosies do o. the petty traffickers, Merch. I, 1, 12. wont through a secret grate of iron bars in yonder tower to o. the city and thence discover, H6A I, 4, 11. whose top-branch --ed Jove's spreading tree, H6C V, 2, 14. the ocean, --ing of his list, Hml. IV, 5, 99.
